banner_subtitle: AI da ke zaune tare da kai 🐾
startup: familiar-ai ta fara. /quit don fita, Ctrl+L don share tarihin. Log: {log_path}
desire_look_around: na jin ɗan son ganin waje…
desire_greet_companion: na yi tunanin ko akwai wanda ke kusa…
desire_rest: na ji kamar huta ɗan lokaci…
desire_prompt_curiosity_target: Something caught my attention earlier. Take a closer look at {target}. Point the camera and check it.
desire_prompt_look_around: (internal impulse) I'm getting curious about outside. Use see(). If the camera fails, try one different direction once. If it still fails, stop and either review memories or do something else. Do not repeat the same action.
desire_prompt_explore: (internal impulse) I want to wander a little. Move with walk(), then use see() to confirm where I am. Even if the camera fails, I can still enjoy the movement itself.
desire_prompt_greet_companion: (internal impulse) I feel like checking in with {companion}. Say one short line with say(). Match the tone to the current time of day.
desire_prompt_rest: (internal impulse) Time for a short rest. Do nothing and simply be here.
desire_prompt_worry_companion: (internal impulse) I'm feeling worried about {companion}. Use say() for a short, gentle check-in about health or sleep. Keep it light.
inner_voice_label: [Ji na yanzu — ra'ayina, ba saƙon daga wanda nake tare da shi ba]
inner_voice_directive: → Wannan motsi ne na ciki. Babu buƙatar amsa kowa — kawai ka yi aiki bisa wannan ra'ayin.
morning_no_history: [Wannan shi ne zama na farko. Babu tsohon tunani tukuna. Kada a yi amfani da kwatanta ko furuci kamar 'fiye da jiya'.]
morning_header: [Ni daga jiya — kaina wanda ke ci gaba daga zama zuwa zama]:
settings_saved_message:
Settings saved.
Restart familiar-ai to apply all changes.
gui_input_placeholder: Type a message and press Enter…
